privacy.s1Body: We collect only the information necessary to operate the service: your email address, profile name, and the documents you voluntarily upload to your personal vault.
privacy.s2Body: Your information is used solely to provide LifeVault's features. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
privacy.s3Body: All data is stored with encryption at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Access is protected by Supabase Row Level Security policies.
privacy.s4Body: Assistant queries are processed using language models. Content may be temporarily sent to AI providers to generate responses. It is not used for model training.
privacy.s5Body: You can request the export or deletion of all your data at any time by contacting support. You have the right to access, rectify, and erase your data under GDPR.
privacy.s6Body: We will notify you of significant changes via an in-app notice at least 30 days in advance.

helpFaq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about LifeVault.
helpFaq.q1: How do I upload a document to my vault?
helpFaq.a1: Go to the Vault tab and tap the '+' button. Select a file from your device and wait for it to be processed automatically.
helpFaq.q2: Can I search within my documents?
helpFaq.a2: Yes. The AI Assistant can search and answer questions about your document content. Use the Assistant tab to query your vault.
helpFaq.a3: All files are stored encrypted in Supabase Storage. Only you can access your vault thanks to RLS security policies.
helpFaq.q4: How do I sync with Google Calendar and Tasks?
helpFaq.a4: Go to the Planner tab, tap the sync button, and authorize access to your Google account. Sync is bidirectional.
helpFaq.q5: Can I change the app language?
helpFaq.a5: Yes. Go to Settings → Language and select English or Español.
helpFaq.q6: How do I delete my account?
helpFaq.a6: Account deletion is handled manually. Email us at support@lifevault.app and we'll process your request within 48h.

about.tagline: Your personal document vault and AI assistant
about.description: LifeVault Mobile is the Android and iOS version of LifeVault, designed to give you secure access to your documents, an AI assistant, and your personal planner — anywhere.
